testcase.name: test_redeploy_succeeds_and_preserves_env

failure.message:
AssertionError: assert 'commit' in {'git_pull': 'From https://github.com/Ph1nt0m-oss/save
 * branch main -> FETCH_HEAD
Already up to date.
', 'status': 'deploying'}

testcase.failure:
backend/tests/test_redeploy_webhook.py:63: in test_redeploy_succeeds_and_preserves_env
    assert "commit" in body
E   AssertionError: assert 'commit' in {'git_pull': 'From https://github.com/Ph1nt0m-oss/save
 * branch            main       -> FETCH_HEAD

', 'status': 'deploying'}

testcase.name: test_health_still_healthy_after_redeploy
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_redeploy_webhook.py:72: in test_health_still_healthy_after_redeploy assert r.status_code == 200 E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code
